summary: OpenAI releases OpenAI Agents Python v0.15.1 with new features and bug fixes
xAI launches Grok 4.3, a new large language model with improved performance and a lower price point
Stelia introduces AI OS for enterprise AI
Harness launches Cursor plugin for AI-powered software delivery
Salesforce launches Agentforce Operations, automating back-office processes with specialized agents
Stripe announces 288 new products and features, including wallets for agents and support for AI-native business models
NVIDIA launches Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, a multimodal AI model unifying vision, audio, and language for more efficient AI agents
Google DeepMind releases Gemma 4, a new family of open-source AI models with advanced architectures and multimodal capabilities
Vercel releases @ai-sdk/google-vertex@5.0.0-beta.60 with updated dependencies
IBM introduces IBM Bob, an AI development partner for enterprise teams
Amazon launches AI-powered desktop app for work automation
Hugging Face releases Transformers v5.7.0 with new model additions
AWS and OpenAI partner to bring OpenAI models to Amazon Bedrock, including Codex and Managed Agents
Logic launches spec-driven platform for fully managed AI agents
Adobe's Firefly AI Assistant is now in public beta, enabling users to create content with multi-step workflows across Creative Cloud apps
DeepSeek releases V4, a model with a 1M-token context window designed for efficient large context length support and agentic tasks
OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, a smarter and more intuitive model for complex tasks like coding and research
Cohere launches Embed v4, the first production multimodal embedding model capable of vectorizing text, images, and documents
OpenAI's GPT-5.5 is now available in Microsoft Foundry for enterprise teams
Google releases Gemini Embedding 2, a natively multimodal embedding model that unifies text, images, video, audio, and PDFs into a single vector space
Infinitus introduces no-code AI agent builder for healthcare
Tencent releases embodied foundation model for real-world agents
Alibaba Qwen Team releases Qwen3.6-27B, a dense open-weight model
Release of DenseOn and LateOn, open state-of-the-art single and multi-vector models for retrieval tasks

topic: Deep Research and Deep Research Max
summary: Google releases Deep Research and Deep Research Max, autonomous research agents for advanced data analysis and knowledge work
Osirus introduces unified platform for building, deploying, and managing enterprise AI agents
Belmont releases v0.9.6 with improvements to planning modes and other features
InclusionAI releases DR-Venus, a 4B-parameter deep research agent
